result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text >= date
LINE 4:   WHERE createddate >= DATE '2022-04-01'
                            ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH last4q_cases AS (
  SELECT id
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE createddate >= DATE '2022-04-01'
    AND createddate <  DATE '2023-04-01'
), assignments AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS caseid,
         ch.oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
         ch.newvalue__c AS new_owner
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN last4q_cases c ON c.id = ch.caseid__c
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
), transfers AS (
  SELECT REGEXP_REPLACE(COALESCE(old_owner,''), '^#', '') AS agent_id,
         COUNT(*) AS transfer_count
  FROM assignments
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(old_owner) <> ''
    AND new_owner IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(new_owner) <> ''
    AND REGEXP_REPLACE(TRIM(old_owner), '^#', '') <> REGEXP_REPLACE(TRIM(new_owner), '^#', '')
  GROUP BY 1
), handled_agents AS (
  -- any agent appearing as either old or new owner in any owner assignment within the window
  SELECT DISTINCT REGEXP_REPLACE(TRIM(owner_raw), '^#', '') AS agent_id
  FROM (
    SELECT old_owner AS owner_raw FROM assignments
    UNION ALL
    SELECT new_owner AS owner_raw FROM assignments
  ) x
  WHERE owner_raw IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(owner_raw) <> ''
)
SELECT ha.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM handled_agents ha
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = ha.agent_id
WHERE COALESCE(t.transfer_count, 0) = (
  SELECT MIN(COALESCE(t2.transfer_count, 0))
  FROM handled_agents ha2
  LEFT JOIN transfers t2 ON t2.agent_id = ha2.agent_id
)
ORDER BY ha.agent_id
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH last4q_cases AS (
  SELECT id
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE createddate >= DATE '2022-04-01'
    AND createddate <  DATE '2023-04-01'
), assignments AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS caseid,
         ch.oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
         ch.newvalue__c AS new_owner
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN last4q_cases c ON c.id = ch.caseid__c
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
), transfers AS (
  SELECT REGEXP_REPLACE(COALESCE(old_owner,''), '^#', '') AS agent_id,
         COUNT(*) AS transfer_count
  FROM assignments
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(old_owner) <> ''
    AND new_owner IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(new_owner) <> ''
    AND REGEXP_REPLACE(TRIM(old_owner), '^#', '') <> REGEXP_REPLACE(TRIM(new_owner), '^#', '')
  GROUP BY 1
), handled_agents AS (
  -- any agent appearing as either old or new owner in any owner assignment within the window
  SELECT DISTINCT REGEXP_REPLACE(TRIM(owner_raw), '^#', '') AS agent_id
  FROM (
    SELECT old_owner AS owner_raw FROM assignments
    UNION ALL
    SELECT new_owner AS owner_raw FROM assignments
  ) x
  WHERE owner_raw IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(owner_raw) <> ''
)
SELECT ha.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM handled_agents ha
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = ha.agent_id
WHERE COALESCE(t.transfer_count, 0) = (
  SELECT MIN(COALESCE(t2.transfer_count, 0))
  FROM handled_agents ha2
  LEFT JOIN transfers t2 ON t2.agent_id = ha2.agent_id
)
ORDER BY ha.agent_id
LIMIT 1;

WITH last4q_cases AS (
  SELECT id
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE createddate >= DATE '2022-04-01'
    AND createddate <  DATE '2023-04-01'
), assignments AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS caseid,
         ch.oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
         ch.newvalue__c AS new_owner
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN last4q_cases c ON c.id = ch.caseid__c
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
), transfers AS (
  SELECT REGEXP_REPLACE(COALESCE(old_owner,''), '^#', '') AS agent_id,
         COUNT(*) AS transfer_count
  FROM assignments
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(old_owner) <> ''
    AND new_owner IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(new_owner) <> ''
    AND REGEXP_REPLACE(TRIM(old_owner), '^#', '') <> REGEXP_REPLACE(TRIM(new_owner), '^#', '')
  GROUP BY 1
), handled_agents AS (
  -- any agent appearing as either old or new owner in any owner assignment within the window
  SELECT DISTINCT REGEXP_REPLACE(TRIM(owner_raw), '^#', '') AS agent_id
  FROM (
    SELECT old_owner AS owner_raw FROM assignments
    UNION ALL
    SELECT new_owner AS owner_raw FROM assignments
  ) x
  WHERE owner_raw IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(owner_raw) <> ''
)
SELECT ha.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM handled_agents ha
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = ha.agent_id
WHERE COALESCE(t.transfer_count, 0) = (
  SELECT MIN(COALESCE(t2.transfer_count, 0))
  FROM handled_agents ha2
  LEFT JOIN transfers t2 ON t2.agent_id = ha2.agent_id
)
ORDER BY ha.agent_id
LIMIT 1;

WITH last4q_cases AS (
  SELECT id
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2022-04-01'
    AND createddate::timestamp <  TIMESTAMP '2023-04-01'
), assignments AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS caseid,
         ch.oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
         ch.newvalue__c AS new_owner
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN last4q_cases c ON c.id = ch.caseid__c
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
), transfers AS (
  SELECT REGEXP_REPLACE(TRIM(old_owner), '^#', '') AS agent_id,
         COUNT(*) AS transfer_count
  FROM assignments
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(old_owner) <> ''
    AND new_owner IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(new_owner) <> ''
    AND REGEXP_REPLACE(TRIM(old_owner), '^#', '') <> REGEXP_REPLACE(TRIM(new_owner), '^#', '')
  GROUP BY 1
), handled_agents AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT REGEXP_REPLACE(TRIM(owner_raw), '^#', '') AS agent_id
  FROM (
    SELECT old_owner AS owner_raw FROM assignments
    UNION ALL
    SELECT new_owner AS owner_raw FROM assignments
  ) x
  WHERE owner_raw IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(owner_raw) <> ''
)
SELECT ha.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM handled_agents ha
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = ha.agent_id
WHERE COALESCE(t.transfer_count, 0) = (
  SELECT MIN(COALESCE(t2.transfer_count, 0))
  FROM handled_agents ha2
  LEFT JOIN transfers t2 ON t2.agent_id = ha2.agent_id
)
ORDER BY ha.agent_id
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH last4q_cases AS (
  SELECT id
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2022-04-01'
    AND createddate::timestamp <  TIMESTAMP '2023-04-01'
)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS cases_in_window FROM last4q_cases;

args.query:
WITH last4q_cases AS (
  SELECT id
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2022-04-01'
    AND createddate::timestamp <  TIMESTAMP '2023-04-01'
)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS owner_hist_rows
FROM casehistory__c ch
JOIN last4q_cases c ON c.id = ch.caseid__c
WHERE ch.field__c ILIKE '%Owner%';

args.query:
WITH last4q_cases AS (
  SELECT id
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2022-04-01'
    AND createddate::timestamp <  TIMESTAMP '2023-04-01'
)
SELECT ch.field__c, COUNT(*) cnt
FROM casehistory__c ch
JOIN last4q_cases c ON c.id = ch.caseid__c
GROUP BY ch.field__c
ORDER BY cnt DESC
LIMIT 20;

args.query:
WITH last4q_cases AS (
  SELECT id
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2022-04-01'
    AND createddate::timestamp <  TIMESTAMP '2023-04-01'
), assignments AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS caseid,
         ch.oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
         ch.newvalue__c AS new_owner
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN last4q_cases c ON c.id = ch.caseid__c
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
)
SELECT old_owner, new_owner, COUNT(*) cnt
FROM assignments
GROUP BY old_owner, new_owner
ORDER BY cnt DESC
LIMIT 20;

  AND new_owner IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(new_owner) <> '' AND new_owner <> 'None'
  AND REGEXP_REPLACE(TRIM(old_owner), '^#', '') <> REGEXP_REPLACE(TRIM(new_owner), '^#', '');

args.query:
WITH last4q_cases AS (
  SELECT id
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2022-04-01'
    AND createddate::timestamp <  TIMESTAMP '2023-04-01'
), assignments AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS caseid,
         ch.oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
         ch.newvalue__c AS new_owner,
         ch.createddate
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN last4q_cases c ON c.id = ch.caseid__c
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
)
SELECT *
FROM assignments
WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(old_owner) <> '' AND old_owner <> 'None'
  AND new_owner IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(new_owner) <> '' AND new_owner <> 'None'
  AND REGEXP_REPLACE(TRIM(old_owner), '^#', '') <> REGEXP_REPLACE(TRIM(new_owner), '^#', '')
LIMIT 10;

args.query:
WITH last4q_cases AS (
  SELECT id
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2022-04-01'
    AND createddate::timestamp <  TIMESTAMP '2023-04-01'
), assignments AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS caseid,
         ch.oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
         ch.newvalue__c AS new_owner
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN last4q_cases c ON c.id = ch.caseid__c
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
), transfers AS (
  SELECT REGEXP_REPLACE(TRIM(old_owner), '^#', '') AS agent_id,
         COUNT(*) AS transfer_count
  FROM assignments
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(old_owner) <> '' AND old_owner <> 'None'
    AND new_owner IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(new_owner) <> '' AND new_owner <> 'None'
    AND REGEXP_REPLACE(TRIM(old_owner), '^#', '') <> REGEXP_REPLACE(TRIM(new_owner), '^#', '')
  GROUP BY 1
), handled_agents AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT REGEXP_REPLACE(TRIM(owner_raw), '^#', '') AS agent_id
  FROM (
    SELECT new_owner AS owner_raw FROM assignments
    UNION ALL
    SELECT old_owner AS owner_raw FROM assignments
  ) x
  WHERE owner_raw IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(owner_raw) <> '' AND owner_raw <> 'None'
)
SELECT ha.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM handled_agents ha
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = ha.agent_id
WHERE COALESCE(t.transfer_count, 0) = (
  SELECT MIN(COALESCE(t2.transfer_count, 0))
  FROM handled_agents ha2
  LEFT JOIN transfers t2 ON t2.agent_id = ha2.agent_id
)
ORDER BY ha.agent_id
LIMIT 1;
